meta_title: For Freelancers: API integration guide to Solve no version control (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to API integration guide and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Solving Version Control with API Integration
content.seo_description: Stop losing work. Learn how to implement robust API integrations and version control workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship projects faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate the chaos of manual file management, implement a Git-based version control strategy paired with automated API integration. By using Claude Code to manage repository states and Antigravity to abstract API complexity, you create a repeatable, professional development workflow that protects your code and accelerates client delivery cycles.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: 3:00 AM, a client needs a critical patch, and you’re staring at a folder full of 'final_v2_real_final' files, praying that your latest API change didn't break the production build. The absence of version control isn't just a technical oversight; it’s a ticking time bomb that destroys your professional reputation and drains your billable hours.

But here is the turning point. By shifting your workflow to a modern, AI-augmented stack, you move from frantic manual deployments to a streamlined, bulletproof process. We’re going to replace your disorganized file structure with a professional API integration pipeline that turns every deployment into a predictable, automated win.

steps.title: Initialize the Repository Environment
steps.description: Establish a base git repository to capture state before modifying any API logic. This ensures a clean rollback point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional directory structure for a Node.js API project, including a .gitignore file, a README template, and a basic git init command.
steps.claude_code_command: claude git init && claude commit -m 'Initial project scaffolding'

steps.title: Define API Schema with Antigravity
steps.description: Create a robust API contract. Using Antigravity ensures your integration is typed and scalable from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an OpenAPI spec for a RESTful user management service. Include endpoints for create, read, and delete, with proper error handling schemas.

steps.title: Automate Integration Logic
steps.description: Inject the API logic into your codebase using Claude Code to ensure syntax consistency and modularity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular API client in TypeScript that consumes the OpenAPI spec. Include Axios interceptors for authentication and logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate --prompt 'Create API client for the openapi.yaml spec'

steps.title: Implement Versioned Commit Hooks
steps.description: Integrate pre-commit hooks to validate API changes before they reach the main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a husky pre-commit script that runs linting and schema validation against the API client code.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx husky add .husky/pre-commit "npm run validate-api"'

steps.title: Deploy with Atomic Versioning
steps.description: Finalize your deployment workflow, ensuring every API update corresponds to a specific git tag.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a shell script that tags the current git commit with a semantic version and triggers a deployment simulation.

pro_tips: Always use environment variable injection for API keys; never hardcode credentials, even in local testing.
Use 'Conventional Commits' to automate your changelogs, making you look like a senior lead to your clients.
Implement a 'dry-run' flag in your API client to test integration logic without hitting live production databases.
Treat your API documentation as code; if it’s not in the repo, the feature doesn't exist.
Leverage Claude Code's 'explain' feature on every pull request to ensure you understand the generated logic before merging.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Now that you have version control and a robust API structure, implement a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to automate your testing suite on every push.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your own code and start delivering high-end, scalable solutions that command premium rates. You have the tools, the workflow, and the strategy to scale your freelance business beyond the limitations of manual file management. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
